title: Crispy Tangy Mexican Onion Stir-fry
description: A festive, crisp Mexican stir‑fry that turns humble onions into a bright, tangy delight.
instructions: 1. Heat a large non‑stick skillet over medium‑high heat and add the olive oil.
2. Once hot, add the sliced onions and season with sea salt and black pepper.
3. Cook, stirring frequently, until the onions are translucent and begin to brown, about 8‑10 minutes.
4. Sprinkle the cumin, smoked paprika, and cayenne pepper over the onions, stirring to coat and toast the spices for 1 minute.
5. Reduce heat to medium, drizzle in the lime juice, and stir to combine; the acidity will lift the flavors and keep the onions crisp.
6. Cook for another 2‑3 minutes, allowing the lime to caramelize slightly and the onions to finish crisping.
7. Remove from heat and stir in chopped cilantro and toasted sesame seeds for a burst of freshness and texture.
8. Serve immediately as a side or as a topping for grilled meats or rice.
